title: SH Hoteles (Spain)
description: This chain operates various urban and beach properties primarily in the Valencia and Alicante regions. Key Properties: SH Valencia Palace: A 5-star hotel located near the city center of Valencia. SH Villa Gadea: A luxury resort in Altea known for its extensive Thalasso-Spa facilities. SH Inglés: A boutique hotel situated in a renovated 18th-century palace in Valencia's historical center. Other locations: Includes properties in Jávea, Denia, and Gandía
